network_summary: Dr. Steven J. Napier, DDS, is the founder, owner, and President of Grand Dental Group, a privately-owned multi-location general dental group operating across Illinois. All four NPPES cluster locations operate under the 'Grand Dental' consumer brand. The group's website (granddentalgroup.com) confirms at least 8–12 locations statewide. No PE sponsor, MSO, or management-company layer was found; this is a dentist-owned multi-office private group.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Steven J. Napier, DDS — founder, President & Owner, Grand Dental Group. Graduate of University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign (undergraduate) and University of Illinois at Chicago (DDS). 32+ years in practice.
durable_artifacts: NPPES AO 'STEVE NAPIER' spans all 4 cluster NPIs across 4 distinct ZIPs (60131, 60410, 60481, 60505)
All 4 locations registered under legal entity 'GRAND DENTAL ASSOCIATES P.C.'
Shared brand domain granddentalgroup.com lists all cluster locations by name/address
evidence_chain: AO signal: STEVE NAPIER listed as authorized official on 4 distinct NPPES organization NPIs across 4 Illinois ZIPs, all under legal name 'GRAND DENTAL ASSOCIATES P.C.'. Documentary corroboration: (1) granddentalfranklinpark.com/dr-steve-napier.html bio names Dr. Steve Napier as founder/owner leading 8 locations; (2) granddentalgroup.com/locations/ lists all four cluster addresses confirming a single owner-operated group brand; (3) ZoomInfo lists Steve Napier as President & Owner at Grand Dental with email @granddentalgroup.com; (4) per-location websites (granddentalchannahon.com, granddentalwilmington.com, granddentalaurora.com) all tie back to the same ownership. No PE transaction, MSO agreement, or management-company layer found in any search.
future_app_notes: Grand Dental Group bio states 8 locations (as of 2026); only 4 appear in our watched-IL ZIPs. Locations such as Naperville (granddentalnaperville.com), Lockport (granddentallockport.com), Sycamore (134 W State St, Sycamore), and Lake Zurich may fall in watched ZIPs but have different location_ids or are outside our watch coverage — worth checking coverage. EIN 203927440 (Aurora NPI 1316396518) could be cross-checked against any other watched locations. Dr. Napier was a solo founder; no succession / PE sale signals found, but worth re-checking annually given 30+ year tenure.
